description: This morning we received a nice card from the GVA for the birth of my daughter Dina, with all their names and this little problem on it. Thanks guys :)
sgf:
(;AB[rs]AB[qs]AW[rr]AW[rq]AB[qr]AB[qq]AB[qp]AB[ro]AB[so]AB[qo]AW[ps]AW[pr]AW[pq]AW[pp]AW[po]AW[qn]AW[rn]AW[sn]LB[pn:T]C[Live without ko. Play T if you think that can't be done.]AP[goproblems]
(;B[sq];W[sr]
(;B[sp]C[Black lives in seki, clean and simple.RIGHT])
(;B[rp];W[sp]C[Ko])
(;B[ss];W[sp]C[Black is dead.]))
(;B[sr];W[sq]C[Click T for Tenuki if you want to play elsewhere]LB[pn:T]
(;B[ss]C[Dead])
(;B[rp];W[ss]C[Ko])
(;B[sp];W[ss]C[Ko])
(;B[pn]C[It is still ko, although White will need an extra threat to win if Black does not start it. Usually this situation remains unplayed until the endgame, hence the name '10.000 year ko'.]))
(;B[ss];W[sq]C[Dead])
(;B[rp];W[sr]
(;B[ss];W[sp])
(;B[sq];W[sp]C[Ko])
(;B[sp]C[Dead]))
(;B[sp];W[sq]
(;B[rp];W[ss])
(;B[sr];W[ss]C[Ko])
(;B[ss]C[Dead]))
(;B[pn]AB[qn]AB[rn]AB[sn]AW[qo]AW[ro]AW[so]AW[qp]AW[qq]AW[qr]AW[qs]AB[rq]AB[rr]AW[rs]AB[ps]AB[pr]AB[pq]AB[pp]AB[po];W[sq]C[So you think the corner can't live. Then you will know how to kill it if we swap sides and White plays T3, right?]
(;B[rp];W[sr]C[Alive])
(;B[sr];W[sp]C[Alive])
(;B[sp];W[rp]C[Very much alive])))
source: Go Vereniging Alphen aan den Rijn
